name: Sword & Shield | Morgan Class | British Weird War
description: https://lnk.bio/kyoushuneko_miniatures Disclaimer: > This is our unique take on the Konflikt '47 Galahad Armoured Infantry. Unit Lore: As the Weird War progressed and the threat to the Home Islands grew, thousands of British women stepped forward, volunteering to defend Her Majesty the Queen. These brave souls were equipped with the Morgan Class Armoured Frame, a masterpiece of dieselpunk engineering. Combining heavy plating with agile hydraulic systems, the Morgan Class allows these volunteers to stride fearlessly into the fray, laying waste to any who dare challenge the Crown on the battlefield.
